INSERT INTO payroll_batches (
  batch_code, period_start, period_end, 
  total_amount, total_workers, total_deductions, total_bonuses,
  status, created_by, created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  'Batch-2026-02-001', '2026-02-01', '2026-02-02',
  5328.00, 9, 0.00, 0.00,
  'draft', 1, NOW(), NOW()
);
